The '''VoiceBox Speech Pattern Duplicator''' was produced by [[BothiCorp]] to bypass voice-activated [[Starship/Legends|starship]] locking systems. The device connected to the ship's locking mechanism, where it searched the lock's memory for encrypted voice patterns. The VoiceBox could then convert the user's voice patterns to the pattern recognized by the locking mechanism.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|13|Special Ops: Ship Jackers}} {{1st}}
